title: Seven-Four
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Seven-Four
CT-6/774 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]{{StoryCite|story=Equipment (short story)|book=Star Wars: Short Story Collection}} **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Take care of the equipment, Eight-Three.''"
"''And the equipment will take care of us, Seven-Four.|Seven-Four and Eight-Three|{{StoryCite|story=Equipment (short story)|book=Star Wars: Short Story Collection}}}} '''Seven-Four''', designated '''CT-6/774''', was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] auxiliary heavy-weapons specialist who served as a turret gunner on a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]]. His LAAT/i was stationed on ''[[Halleck]]'' immediately prior to the [[Battle of Haruun Kal/Legends|Battle of Haruun Kal]]. Seven-Four was commanded by [[Clone Lieutenant/Legends|clone trooper lieutenant]] [[Four-One]] and 2nd Lieutenant [[CL-33/890]], and worked alongside his fellow Auxiliary Heavy-Weapons Specialist and [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] [[Eight-Three]]. During the suborbital entry in the Battle of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]] his attack force was ambushed by [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|vulture droids]], resulting in heavy casualties. He scored several kills, but his turret's servo-boom was damaged by enemy fire, resulting in his turret becoming dislodged from the gunship. The remaining [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] ships descended into the lower atmosphere as per the mission objective, and Seven-Four remained stranded with other troops who had been shot out of their [[Jadthu-class landing ship/Legends|''Jadthu''-class landing ships]] and gunships. Nevertheless, Seven-Four managed to destroy the last remaining ''Vulture'' droid with a final shot, powered by the backup powercells in the turret. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] had been chasing the gunship from which he had become separated, which the clones then used to save all of the survivors. For his actions, Seven-Four was recommended for a battlefield commendation. ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=Equipment (short story)|book=Star Wars: Short Story Collection}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=CT-6/774 |fi=CT-6/774 }} [[Category:Clone gunners]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
